description: You are a Financial Manager organizing your email for an upcoming audit. Move the five emails from 'sarah.chen@acmefinancial.com' regarding 'Q3 Budget Review' (Marketing Department, Engineering Costs, Sales Projections, Operations Summary, and HR and Recruiting) from the Inbox in Local Folders to the 'Budget_Reviews' folder under Local Folders. Ensure only these five emails are moved and the 'Budget_Reviews' folder contains exactly these items.

expected_subjects: Q3 Budget Review - HR and Recruiting
